scroll_found.title: Research the Sound Archive scroll at a Research Pedestal

etched_disc.title: Craft an Etched recording disc (Etched mod — blank disc + etching table to record music)

subtitle.text: Every civilization kept music. Even the ones that didn't survive.

description: CH.02 · THE SOUND ARCHIVE
▸ Etched and Xerca add a full music recording
and playback system to the modpack.
Blank discs. Etching tables. Speakers.
Record ambient sounds. Share them.
Build a jukebox corner in your base.
◈ ETCHED + XERCA SYSTEM
└ Blank Disc: crafted from iron + quartz
└ Etching Table: records nearby sound into disc
└ Xerca Speaker: plays disc with range + volume control
└ Discs can be shared: same sound, different world
└ Custom ambient: record a cave, a waterfall, a battle
◈ WHY IT MATTERS
└ The lore says: civilizations left records
└ The Sound Archive scroll is one of those records
└ Someone recorded the last fire before their city fell
└ You found it
└ You can do the same
◈ SCROLL: The Sound Archive
└ Found in: music box ruins, village library chests,
bard camp loot, road amphitheater ruins
└ Research time: 10 min
└ Unlocks: Etched system awareness, Xerca speaker knowledge
▸ Culture is what a civilization leaves behind.
The farms rot. The roads crack.
But the music, if you've recorded it —
plays on.
▶ Find The Sound Archive scroll [check]
▶ Craft an Etched recording disc [check]
◇ Ch05 The Culture Age goes deeper into Etched
and its relationship with Villager Recruits.
A bard follower can generate disc recordings.
